title: Verify Read-Only Link Generation
objective: Validates that the system can generate a unique, read-only sharing URL for a campaign.

steps.step: As a logged-in GM, navigate to the main dashboard for a campaign.
Locate and click the 'Share Campaign' button or option.
steps.expected_result: The system processes the request and presents a unique URL to the GM (e.g., 'https://path.camp/share/a7d8f...').
The URL is successfully copied to the clipboard.
